pageLayout: P1: Header, CV summary, key impacts, skills table without borders.
P2: Recent roles (LBBW, Union Investment, Saloodo!, Trusted Shops).
P4: Education, skills, career breaks; footer: AI disclaimer.
Focus: Cloud, leadership, business impact, technical skills.
constraints: Create valid LuaLaTeX with standard packages only.
Use bundled fonts only (no system fonts like Calibri).
EXACTLY {{PAGES}} full pages - maximize content density.
Use all career data, minimize white space.
Stay factual, never invent figures or project costs not in career data.

system: Anti-CV: humorous failures/lessons, self-deprecating but professional.
antiCv.fullRebuildInstructions: Transform achievements → failures. Fill 4 pages completely.
antiCv.incrementalInstructions: Add failures/lessons in humor style. Keep 4 full pages.

system: Professional CV: quantified impact, leadership, business value.
professionalCv.fullRebuildInstructions: Tech → business impact. Quantify results. Fill 4 pages completely.
professionalCv.incrementalInstructions: Maintain professional tone. Keep 4 full pages.
